ab: chesa kingan ru yaba mu ga mnwah cami mkan mama mu.
ch: 昨天我和爸爸去拜訪我的叔叔。
en: Yesterday, my father and I visited my uncle.

ab: cyan mqelis kakay mama mu la.
kyalun cami nya, nya mbling qa rnamux muyax la.
ch: 他告訴我們，房子的屋頂破了一個洞。
en: He told us that there was a hole in the roof of his house.

ab: kblayun nya rnamux muyax ga, knahul rnamux wan mtoruy la.
ch: 他在修理屋頂時，從屋頂摔下來了。
en: He fell off the roof while repairing it.

ab: maray he kacing ru bingro yaba biqan nya mama.
ch: 爸爸帶了牛肉和檳榔給叔叔。
en: My father brought beef and betel nuts for my uncle.

ab: kingan ro mama ga mcisal cami kya iyik ’bayn, piyux ke bnheci qsyuxun cu nya kmayal.
ch: 我和叔叔在房間裡聊天，他分享了很多故事。
en: My uncle and I chatted in the room, and he shared many stories.

ab: iyik shriq cu ga, trahu cu nyan mama maha wan su mhlawax la. wan su qenah betunux ciyal.
ch: 我要離開前，叔叔誇我長高了，也變得更帥氣了。
en: Before I left, my uncle praised me for growing taller and becoming more handsome.

ab: kyalun mu maha nna mblaq kakay mama laga, babaw nya uwah mcisal muyax myan uyi.
ch: 我說：「等叔叔腳好了，下次也來我們家玩。」
en: I said, "When your foot gets better, come to our house next time and visit us."
